options.command: cd apps/api-product && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && cd ../..
cd apps/api-product && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && cd ../..
cd apps/api-product && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts && cd ../..

cd apps/api-product && docker compose up -d && until pg_isready -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres; do sleep 1; done && cd ../.. && npm run db:generate:product && npm run db:migrate:product && npm run db:seed:product
